production.playableLoop: Accelerate along the runway, take off through gusts, recover from a commanded stall, and land.
production.objective: Complete takeoff, stall, recovery, and landing in order.
production.progression: FlightState records the four ordered flight phases and retry count.
production.failRetry: A failed recovery can be restarted with KeyR, which resets the craft pose, velocity, and FlightState.

assetPlan.playerHero: Repository-supplied Douglas SBD-3 GLB with authored propeller and flap animation clips
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: authored gust volumes and stall envelope
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: authored runway, wind markers, lighting, and aerodynamic volumes
